queries.q: Write a problem statement for the drop-off we're seeing in mobile checkout
This project has drifted so far that nobody remembers what we set out to fix; help me re-anchor it in the original problem
queries.notes: Intent-only ask; realigning a drifted project

queries.q: I need to explain to leadership why activation matters before they'll fund the work; frame the problem with user impact and success criteria
Frame the support-ticket backlog issue as a crisp problem doc the team can align on before we discuss solutions
New engineers keep jumping to solutions; create the document that establishes what problem we're solving and how we'll know it's solved
Kick off the retention initiative with a clear problem framing: who is affected, what it costs us, and what success looks like
Draft a problem statement for enterprise admins struggling with user provisioning
Before we commit a team to this, I want one page that nails the problem, the impact, and the success criteria
Our VP asked what problem we are actually solving here and I didn't have a good answer; help me write it down properly
Someone proposed a chatbot but I'm not convinced it addresses the real issue; help me articulate the core problem first
queries.notes: Evaluating whether a proposed solution addresses the core problem

queries.q: The problem is agreed and funded; write the full requirements doc so engineering can start building
queries.notes: Agreed problem plus spec ask belongs to the PRD, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: We think onboarding emails will lift activation by 10 percent; turn that assumption into something testable with success metrics
queries.notes: An unvalidated assumption to test, not a problem to frame, per When NOT to Use

queries.q: Compare three solution approaches for the latency issue in a one-page brief for stakeholders
queries.notes: Proposing and comparing solutions; develop-solution-brief territory

queries.q: Build a JTBD canvas for why customers hire our scheduling product
Map our desired retention outcome to opportunities and solution ideas in a discovery tree
Create a persona for our power-user segment based on last quarter's research
Debug this null pointer exception showing up in our checkout service logs
Write a regex that extracts order IDs from these log lines
Find me a good hotel near the conference center in Berlin for next week
Run RICE and MoSCoW over this feature list and tell me where they disagree
